extratoCta.sectionTitle: Upload your PDF bill and see if it mentions Factor K
extratoCta.compareDisclaimer: Illustrative comparison with fictional amounts for visualization only.
extratoCta.step1Detail: Upload a PDF of your SABESP bill or statement. Reading is automatic; after the result you can optionally enter contact details.
extratoCta.step2Detail: We extract text from the PDF and search for Factor K wording. This is not legal advice.
extratoCta.step3Detail: If the text suggests Factor K, our team may contact you using the details you provided.
extratoCta.idleDescription: Upload your bill PDF for an automatic scan. If you want to speak with the firm, use the buttons after the result.
extratoCta.leadDescription: We need this information to follow up on your case and to send your email confirmation.
extratoCta.leadResumo: Lead — Factor K tool: bill/statement upload (pre-check on website).

fields.emailHelp: You will receive a confirmation email; we may also use it to contact you.

validation.name: Please enter your name
validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number

extratoCta.uploadSubtitle: Drag and drop or click to select. Automatic reading works with PDF files; images are not analyzed in this step.
extratoCta.resultFoundTitle: We found a Factor K mention in the text
extratoCta.resultFoundBody:
The preliminary reading of the submitted file indicates the need for a more in-depth analysis of the bill in order to accurately verify the composition of the charge and any tariff criteria that require individualized technical and legal review.

For a reliable conclusion, we recommend scheduling an analysis with the firm's team, when a detailed review of the documentation and guidance on appropriate measures will be possible.

This initial review by the team will be free of charge, aimed at a more accurate verification of the case and identifying the possible viability of further proceedings.
extratoCta.resultContactConfirmedBody:
Your request has been recorded.

Our team will contact you as soon as possible to continue the case review.

If you wish, you can upload another file for a new check.
extratoCta.resultFoundWhatsAppMessage: Hello, I would like to schedule an analysis of my bill after the preliminary check on the website (Factor K).
extratoCta.resultNotFoundTitle: No consistent Factor K indicators identified in this file
extratoCta.resultNotFoundBody:
After a preliminary analysis of the submitted file, no sufficient elements were identified at this time that would allow consistent indications of a charge related to Factor K on the bill presented.

Important: this check was performed automatically and may therefore contain errors, inaccuracies, or omissions.

If you wish to have an individualized technical and legal analysis with a more in-depth review of the documentation, our team remains at your disposal.
extratoCta.errorGeneric: We could not save your details. Please try again.
extratoCta.errorAnalyze:
We could not read the bill you uploaded properly.

This may happen, for example, due to low resolution, a cropped image, shadow, missing pages, or a file format that hinders automated reading.

We recommend resending the bill as a readable PDF or as a sharp, complete, uncropped image so a new check can be performed.
extratoCta.errorStorage: We could not save the file on the server. Try again shortly or contact the firm.
extratoCta.needsPdf: For automatic analysis, please upload a PDF file (not an image).

success.title: Email confirmed successfully
success.description: Your email was validated. Our team can now proceed with regular contact.

already_confirmed.title: This email has already been confirmed
already_confirmed.description: Your record was already validated. If needed, you can contact our team now.

expired.title: Expired link
expired.description: The confirmation link expired. You can request a new one right now.

invalid.title: Invalid link
invalid.description: We could not validate this link. Request a new confirmation email.
